template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic on cream background. Left panel dark navy, bold 'BEFORE' label with red X icon, three short labels: 'HIGH RATES', 'ZERO RFQS', 'MARKET INVISIBLE'. Right panel white, bold 'AFTER' label with green checkmarks, three short labels: 'RATES REPRICED', 'FIRST RFQ', 'AWARD LANDED'. Top bold headline: 'BAD PRICES KILL GOOD PIPELINES'. Center: illustrated professional man in blazer reviewing a laptop, expression shifting from concerned to confident. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
